Package neqsim.process.safety.barrier

package neqsim.process.safety.barrier
Barrier management objects for process safety functions and safety critical elements.

The package links technical documentation evidence, performance standards, barriers, and safety critical elements so agents can turn P&IDs, cause and effect charts, safety requirement specifications, technical requirements, and inspection reports into auditable NeqSim safety analysis inputs.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.safety
     
  • Class
    Description
    BarrierRegister
    Register of safety critical elements, barriers, performance standards, and evidence.
    DocumentEvidence
    Traceable evidence extracted from technical documentation for a safety decision.
    PerformanceStandard
    Performance standard for a process safety function or safety critical element.
    PerformanceStandard.DemandMode
    Demand mode used for the safety function.
    SafetyBarrier
    Safety barrier or protection layer with document evidence and performance-standard links.
    SafetyBarrier.BarrierStatus
    Operational status of the barrier.
    SafetyBarrier.BarrierType
    Barrier position relative to a top event.
    SafetyCriticalElement
    Safety critical element (SCE) containing one or more safety barriers.
    SafetyCriticalElement.ElementType
    Broad type of safety critical element.
    SafetySystemCategory
    Classification of safety-system barrier functions used in performance assessments.
    SafetySystemDemand
    Demand and capacity data for one safety-system barrier performance check.
    SafetySystemPerformanceAnalyzer
    Assesses active and passive safety-system barrier performance against evidence and demands.
    SafetySystemPerformanceReport
    JSON-friendly report from a safety-system barrier performance assessment.
    SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment
    Assessment of one barrier for one demand case or generic register check.
    SafetySystemPerformanceReport.Finding
    Finding from one safety-system assessment.
    SafetySystemPerformanceReport.FindingSeverity
    Severity of one assessment finding.
    SafetySystemPerformanceReport.Verdict
    Overall and per-barrier performance verdict.
    TR2237Templates
    Factory for TR2237-style performance-standard templates.
